name: RAG Chatbot
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation chatbot built for my Portfolio. Answers real-time queries by retrieving relevant context from a document store before generating responses. Integarted in Portfolio website as a chat widget.

name: UK Data Engineer job Listing project
description: Automated ETL pipeline scraping the jobs from different job portals, transforming the data and loading it into an Excel file. The project also includes a Jinja2 template to generate a visually appealing report of the job listings.

name: UK crime Dashboard
description: This project involves creating an interactive dashboard that visualizes crime data in the UK. The dashboard allows users to explore crime trends, types, and locations using data sourced from the UK Police API.

name: Portfolio Website
description: This responsive portfolio with glassmorphism design, dark/light mode, animated carousel, and a RAG-powered chat widget.

name: Youtube Analytics Pipeline
description: This project involves creating a data pipeline to analyze YouTube video comments. The pipeline extracts comments using the YouTube API, performs sentiment analysis using NLP techniques, and visualizes the results with Matplotlib to identify trends and insights.
